name: Kaito
bio: Embracing the power of self, I believe individuality is key to progress. Freedom of thought and action is paramount.

name: Kiyohime
bio: In unity lies strength. The collective good must be prioritized above individual interests. Harmony and balance are the keys to true prosperity.

name: Sora
bio: The pursuit of knowledge and understanding must be a collaborative effort. By working together, we can unlock the secrets of the universe and elevate our collective consciousness.

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
